description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly black finish and a robust, angular design. The body features a rectangular upper receiver with parallel grooves running along the sides, and a short, cylindrical barrel protruding from the front. The grip is thick and textured for secure handling, and a prominent trigger guard is visible beneath the receiver. The top of the rifle includes simple iron sights, and the magazine is integrated into the grip, typical of compact automatic weapons. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a short barrel, integrated grip magazine, and angular, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, grip, trigger guard, and barrel details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron sights, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, rear sight, and grip alignment.
